creator: mikej@mikej.com
text:
LOR on reboot 

Could not find exact LOR documented bug database/Google/mail archive.

FreeBSD bsd11 11.0-CURRENT FreeBSD 11.0-CURRENT #1 r264318M: Thu Apr 10 12:32:03 EDT 2014     mikej@bsd11:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

devfs mounted by poudriere
tank on /tank (zfs, local, nfsv4acls) <poudriere builds here>

# Device        Mountpoint      FStype  Options Dump    Pass#
/dev/da0p2      /               ufs     rw      1       1
/dev/da0p3      none            swap    sw      0       0

All buffers synced.
lock order reversal:

 2nd 0xfffff8000e6595f0 devfs (devfs) @ /usr/src/sys/kern/vfs_subr.c:2101
